THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORWITT, DAVID RESPONDENT DAVID NORWITT'S SETTLEMENT PAYMENT OF $6,000.00 ON 5/19/93 PURS TO THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF 5/18/93, & PETITIONER JOHN FRIEDMAN'S ACCEPTANCE OF SAME, CONSTITUTED A FULL ACCORD & SATISFACTION OF THE ARBITRATION AWARD; COSTS PER COST BILL.

REMITTITUR FILED SUPERIOR COURT DETERMINES THAT APPELLANT'S CONTENTIONS FAIL TO DEMONSTRATE PREJUDICIAL ERROR, THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED THAT THE MUNICIPAL COURT JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED. PURSUANT TO CCP 1034 AND CRC 135 A,B&C, COSTS ARE AWARDED TO THE PREVAILING PARTY.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $207.50 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE MAR-18-1999, FILED BY DEFENDANT NORWITT, DAVID
